Layout Management.description: Tools for creating and managing drawing layouts, viewports, and paper space configuration

Create Project Layouts.description: Creates paper space layouts from presets. Requires the full AutoCAD GUI.

Create Viewports from Presets.description: Creates viewports on all layouts based on their names and a JSON presets file.

Drawing Cleanup.description: Tools for cleaning, purging, and auditing DWG files for optimal performance

Purge & Audit.description: Cleans drawings using -PURGE, AUDIT, etc. via the Core Console.

Layer Cleanup.description: Freezes unused layers, deletes empty layers, and standardizes layer properties.

Block Cleanup.description: Purges unused blocks, linetypes, text styles, and other unused objects.

Drawing Validation.description: Comprehensive drawing health check with audit, overkill, and validation.

CAD Standards.description: Tools for enforcing and maintaining CAD standards and consistency

Standards Check.description: Validates drawing against CAD standards and generates compliance report.

Text Standardization.description: Creates and applies standard text styles across the drawing.

Dimension Cleanup.description: Standardizes dimension styles and updates all dimensions to current style.

File Operations.description: Tools for batch file operations, plotting, and format conversion

Batch Plot.description: Plots all layouts to PDF with standard plotting settings.

Export Operations.description: Exports drawing in multiple formats (PDF, DWF) and saves in older versions.

DWG Conversion.description: Tools for converting DWG files to other formats and extracting comprehensive drawing data

Convert DWG to DXF.description: Converts the current DWG file to DXF format in the same directory. Uses AutoCAD's native DXFOUT command for reliable conversion.

Export Drawing Metadata.description: Exports comprehensive metadata for all entities in the drawing to a JSON file. Includes handles, types, and all DXF data.

Bulk DWG to DXF Conversion.description: Batch converts multiple DWG files to DXF format via Core Console. Ideal for processing large numbers of drawings.
